# The World as Will and Representation

*[Schopenhauer](../philosophers/schopenhauer.md) · 1818 · *Die Welt als Wille und Vorstellung**

Schopenhauer's single system, in four books: the world as representation, as will, the aesthetic contemplation of the Ideas, and finally the ethics of compassion and the denial of the will-to-live. Long ignored, the work was expanded in 1844 with a second volume of supplements.
